response.overview: Feature-length documentary filmed throughout the selection process of the first Miss Peru, Emma McBride. It includes:  Sights of all the representatives from various countries around the world; the contestants' journey to San Lorenzo Island; the arrival of Miss Bolivia and Miss Chile and the celebrations held in their honor; the election of Miss Peru; Miss McBride's visit to the President of the Republic, Augusto B. Le Guía; the gala races held in honor of the new beauty queen; the young women posing in swimsuits at the Country Club; and the winner's departure for the Miss Universe pageant held in the United States.
response.title: Miss Perú
